title: Opening for Software Engineer at Medlife

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Medlife
jsonLd.description:
Medlife invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Software Engineer at our Howrah location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Medlife:
Medlife is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medlife!
